page.errorBothRequired: Please enter both email and password.
page.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
page.errorPasswordWeak: Password must have 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character (e.g. @#$%).
page.toastAccountCreated: Account created. Check your email to verify your address.
page.resendNeedPassword: Enter your password above, then tap resend. We use it to confirm it's you.
page.toastResendDefault: We sent a new verification link. Check your inbox.

oauth.signupBlockedTitle: Enter your name and business or invite details first

forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, we sent a link to reset your password. The link expires in one hour.
forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to get back into your account.
forgot.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

reset.doneSubtitle: You can sign in with your new password.
reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password you haven't used elsewhere.
reset.hintWeak: Use 8+ characters with upper, lower, number, and special (e.g. @#$%).

checkEmail.emailVerifiedBody: Thanks. You can sign in to continue.
checkEmail.verifyingBody: This will only take a moment.
checkEmail.title: Check your email to verify your account
checkEmail.introSession: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Open it on this device (or copy the link into the browser where you use CareTip).
checkEmail.introResend: Enter your email and password to resend the verification link.
checkEmail.dashboardLocked: The dashboard stays unavailable until your email is verified.
checkEmail.toastCopySuccess: Email address copied. Open your inbox in a browser or app and look for CareTip.
checkEmail.toastCopyError: Could not copy automatically. Your address is shown above.
checkEmail.toastNotVerified: Not verified yet. Open the link in your email first.

unauthorized.title: Access denied
unauthorized.body: You do not have permission to view this page. If you are a platform administrator, sign in from the platform admin login.

sampleDashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Tips, scans, and payouts for your team — one-time payments only
sampleDashboard.overviewHeroBody: CareTip helps guests send tips directly to your team. Share your QR links and keep every payout transparent.
sampleDashboard.overviewHeroPill: One-time tips only, no recurring billing
sampleDashboard.statTeamHint: Invite staff from your business dashboard
sampleDashboard.ctaBody: Guests scan a QR code, choose an amount, and pay once. Funds route through Stripe as a single payment intent — no subscriptions or invoices.

showcase.title: Tip in seconds. Reward great service instantly.
showcase.description: CareTip makes it effortless for customers to tip and for teams to track performance, all with a simple QR scan.
showcase.step1Text: Table tents, badges, or a shareable link, with no guest app required.
showcase.step2Text: Pool by shift or reward individuals. You stay in control.
showcase.step3Text: Staff see earnings; you see performance, without the busywork.
showcase.tabQrAlt: Phone showing CareTip QR tipping screen

simpleSetup.title: A quick journey from setup to tips
simpleSetup.subtitle: Four moments that get you from “not set up” to “tips rolling in”, fast.
simpleSetup.step1Desc: Set up your workspace in a minute.
simpleSetup.step2Desc: Invite staff and assign roles in one flow.
simpleSetup.step3Desc: Download, print, and place where guests look.
simpleSetup.step4Desc: Guests scan and tip, and your dashboard updates instantly.

liveDemo.inviteSub: Roles and areas in one flow.

hospitality.title: Built for hospitality teams
hospitality.subtitle: From restaurants to salons, CareTip helps your team earn more while giving you full visibility into performance.
hospitality.f1Text: Fast, mobile-friendly tipping guests actually use.
hospitality.f2Text: Table, location, or staff QR codes (ready to print).
hospitality.f3Text: Activate staff, assign areas, and track performance.
hospitality.f4Text: Industry-grade checkout with encryption end to end.
hospitality.f5Text: Top performers and live activity (at a glance).

restaurants.role: Table QR tipping • shift pools • staff goals

barbershops.name: Barbershops

foodTrucks.name: Food trucks
foodTrucks.role: Counter QR • quick tips • no extra hardware

eventCenters.name: Event centers
eventCenters.role: Pop-up QR codes • staff routing • clear earnings

hospitalityGroups.name: Hospitality groups
hospitalityGroups.role: Locations & tables • staff mapping • consistent reporting

employeeSection.subtitle: See your earnings, ratings, and performance at a glance. Stay motivated and in control of your growth.
employeeSection.b1Text: Watch tips land as your shift unfolds.
employeeSection.b2Text: Spot patterns that help you earn more.
employeeSection.b3Text: A clear trail of gratitude and feedback.
employeeSection.imageAlt: CareTip employee dashboard showing daily earnings, ratings, and goals

businessSection.subtitle: Monitor performance, track tips, and manage your entire operation from one clean dashboard.
businessSection.b1Text: See momentum across shifts, roles, and locations.
businessSection.b2Text: Understand where tips land, and why it matters.
businessSection.b3Text: Clean exports for finance, payroll, and audits.
businessSection.b4Text: Roles, access, and QR assignments without spreadsheets.
businessSection.imageAlt: CareTip business dashboard on a laptop showing team visibility and analytics

features.title: Everything you need to grow
features.subtitle: One platform for tipping, visibility, and payouts, without the overhead.
features.i1Text: Branded pages guests open in one scan.
features.i2Text: Earnings and momentum in one place.
features.i3Text: See what is working across shifts and venues.
features.i4Text: A clear record for staff and finance.
features.i5Text: Route and release tips with confidence.
features.i6Text: Capture praise while the moment is fresh.

realLife.title: How CareTip works in real life
realLife.s1Text: Customers scan a QR code placed on the table and tip instantly, with no waiting and no cash.
realLife.s1Alt: QR code on a restaurant table for instant tipping
realLife.s2Text: Guests tip staff quickly at check-in or check-out with a simple scan.
realLife.s2Alt: Hotel reception with guest tipping at check-in or check-out
realLife.s3Text: Clients show appreciation right after their service, fast and seamless.
realLife.s4Text: Customers tip from anywhere using a shared link or QR code.
realLife.s4Alt: Home and mobile service tipping moment

finalCta.title: Start rewarding your team today
finalCta.subtitle: Set up in minutes and give your team the recognition they deserve.

footer.brandBlurb: Digital tipping for hospitality: QR codes, payouts, and team insight in one platform.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptySubtitle: New tip activity will show up here.

qrPage.heroDescNoSlug: Generate staff and venue QR codes.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Updates about tips, QR tools, and your CareTip account

1.title: Boost tips with branded QR cards
1.message: Print-ready QR packs help guests tip in seconds. Order from your dashboard or export PDFs for each team member.

2.title: Large tip received
2.message: A guest sent 50 € to your front-of-house team. Funds are processing through Stripe as a one-time payment.

3.title: Tip settled
3.message: A 12 € tip completed successfully. There is no subscription or invoice, just a single PaymentIntent.

4.title: Share staff tipping links
4.message: Each team member gets a personal link so regulars can tip them by name after great service.

5.title: New: instant tip notifications
5.message: Turn on push or email alerts when new tips land so your team can thank guests in the moment.

6.title: Weekly tip summary
6.message: You had 48 successful tips this week. Open Tips & activity for a full breakdown by employee.

accountSettings.heroBodyLong: Accept one-time tips via QR codes and staff links. Payments use Stripe Payment Intents. There is no recurring subscription to CareTip on Starter.
accountSettings.photoClickHint: Click on logo to change profile picture

accountSettings.subtitle: Manage your CareTip business account

accountSettings.pwReqSpec: Contains at least one special character
accountSettings.twoFactorDesc: Use an authenticator app (TOTP) for extra protection.

accountSettings.tipNotifDesc: Get notified when your venue receives a tip.
accountSettings.loginDesc: Email me when a new device signs in.

networkHero.subtitle: Real-time monitoring of global tipping activity and platform health.

shell.demoRibbon: Walkthrough demo: platform views show live database rows including the demo venue; actions still apply to data you change. Prefer read-only exploration for stakeholder tours.

globalTransactionsPage.subtitle: All tips platform-wide. Amounts in EUR, CareTip fee {{feePercent}}%, net to staff, payout status.

platformSettingsPage.title: System settings
platformSettingsPage.subtitle: Global platform configuration. Additional controls can be wired here as your operations grow.
platformSettingsPage.cardBody: No mutable settings are exposed in this build. Use environment variables and your deployment pipeline for infrastructure changes.

userManagementPage.title: User management
userManagementPage.subtitle: Open a business dashboard as the venue manager to troubleshoot issues. Your admin session is saved. Use "Exit impersonation" from the business dashboard banner to return.
userManagementPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by business name, slug, or manager email…
userManagementPage.emptyList: No businesses on the platform yet.

businessVerificationPage.title: Business verification (KYC)
businessVerificationPage.subtitle: New businesses are Pending until you verify them. Verified businesses can generate QR codes. Store contact details for compliance. Tip totals and staff counts load live from the database; the list also refreshes when you return to this tab.
businessVerificationPage.emptyList: No businesses on the platform yet.
businessVerificationPage.toastApproved: Business approved. They can generate QR codes.

businessDetailPage.title: Business details
businessDetailPage.subtitle: Review KYC data, approve or reject verification, and manage compliance files.
